description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses npm with a cache of node_modules/ keyed by $CI_JOB_NAME and includes untracked files. Define a before_script that runs npm install and a shared script that executes npm run lint then npm test. Add three jobs in the default test stage: test:node10 using the node:10 image, test:node6 using node:6, and test:node8 using node:8, each running the shared script and using the defined cache.
